title: Dermatology services | Piel en Armonia
description: Consultations and dermatology procedures in Quito with clear diagnosis, honest explanations, and medical follow-up.
heading: Dermatology services
introTitle: Start with the consultation that sounds closest to what is worrying you today
introDeck: You can begin with diagnosis, a focused procedure, or telemedicine, always with clear follow-up.

featured.title: The consultation that brings order
featured.copy: A full first evaluation that leaves the visit with clear priorities and a realistic plan.

featured.title: Technology chosen with care
featured.copy: Laser and other procedures are suggested only when they truly help and can be followed safely.

featured.title: Remote care with judgment
featured.copy: Telemedicine helps you start sooner and decide whether clinic review is needed.

sections.title: First consultations
sections.deck: Options that clarify diagnosis, sort out what feels urgent, and start treatment with follow-up clearly explained.

cards.title: Diagnosis consultation
cards.copy: A broad first reading to understand the case and decide what deserves attention first.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Medical care to calm inflammation, protect the barrier, and adjust without delay.

cards.title: Moles and lesions
cards.copy: Early review when a mole or lesion changes and deserves to be seen soon.

sections.title: Procedures
sections.deck: Treatments indicated with restraint, honest timing, and aftercare you can realistically keep up at home.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Medical settings reviewed according to skin type, goal, and expected recovery.

cards.title: Chemical peel
cards.copy: An option for texture and spots when the skin is ready to do it well.

cards.title: Biostimulators
cards.copy: Gradual support for firmness and skin quality with realistic expectations.

sections.title: Follow-up and family
sections.deck: Consultations for children, mixed symptoms, and check-ins that need a complete and organized reading.

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Clear guidance for caregivers, school life, and routines that can actually last.

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: One consultation when several symptoms appear together and deserve to be seen in context.

cards.title: Telemedicine
cards.copy: Guides the first step and helps decide whether remote care is enough.

initiatives.title: Photos that help compare change
initiatives.copy: Images are most useful when they are taken in similar conditions over time.

initiatives.title: Adjustments when the skin flares again
initiatives.copy: If lesions return, the plan can shift before the flare gathers momentum.

initiatives.title: Useful explanations for caregivers
initiatives.copy: Families leave with practical steps for home and clear signs for consultation.

initiatives.title: Changes in moles or spots
initiatives.copy: When something shifts quickly, the priority is seeing it soon without downplaying it.

initiatives.title: Settings chosen for your skin
initiatives.copy: Energy and recovery are adjusted to real response, not habit or routine.

initiatives.title: Gradual and believable change
initiatives.copy: The aim is improvement that looks natural and can hold up over time.

initiatives.title: Consent written in plain language
initiatives.copy: Rights, data use, and limits explained without unnecessary legal weight.

initiatives.title: Remote first guidance
initiatives.copy: Telemedicine is most useful when it helps you decide better and arrive on time for consultation.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: While web booking returns, you can start with telemedicine or open the consultation that best fits your case.
